GameController - Class in com.example.sol_eclipsado.controller
Controller for the main game screen.

GameLogic - Class in com.example.sol_eclipsado.model
Manages the core game state and logic for "El Sol Eclipsado."
generateCasillas() - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.controller.GameController
Dynamically generates TextFields for each letter of the secret word.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
Provides access to the single instance of the GameLogic.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
Retrieves the unique instance of the SecretWord class.
getLettersFound() - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
 
getQuantityAid() - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
 
getQuantityFailure() - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
 
getRandomEmptyPosition() - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
Identifies all positions in the secret word that have not been revealed yet and selects one at random to assist the player.

getSecretWordArray() - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord

Retrieves the main stage of the program.
